violations.text: Raw animal foods Bacon were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods vegetables in one door refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils can opener were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025
The chest freezer lid located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the grill line, pizza oven, blender base, and hood have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non food contact surfaces must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2025
The cold water handle on the kitchen hand sink was observed in poor repair. Equipment and fixtures must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2025

The presence of pests is not controlled as evidenced by flys . The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to work with pest control to eliminate pests. New Violation. Correct By: 11/23/2023

Refrigerator door gaskets on the two door true were observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. The lids on the chest freezers in the kitchen were observed in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair New Violation. Correct By: 11/23/2023

Wood is used in the construction of tables in the kitchen. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Establishment is to replace wood structures with structures that are nonabsorbent and smooth and durable. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2024

The ceiling tiles in the dining room are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Correct by 11/23/23 The cement floor in the kitchen, needs to be re-sealed and maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2024
The hand-washing sink behind the counter was lacking was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer, ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2023

The presence of pests is not controlled as evidenced by flys . The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to work with pest control to eliminate pests. New Violation. Correct By: 11/23/2023

Refrigerator door gaskets on the two door true were observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. The lids on the chest freezers in the kitchen were observed in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/23/2023

Wood is used in the construction of tables in the kitchen. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Establishment is to replace wood structures with structures that are nonabsorbent and smooth and durable. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2024

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the hood system, shelving and counter tops have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2023
The drainage from the ice machine unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 11/23/2023

The ceiling tiles in the dining room are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Correct by 11/23/23 The cement floor in the kitchen, needs to be re-sealed and maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2024
